chunks.text: Page 1 THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry & Mr. Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana. High Court Appeal No. 108 of 2024 [Menahel Majeed v. Sahibzada Ghulam Muhammad Khan and others] Appellant: Menahel Majid w/o Khawaja Abdul Ghani Majid through Mr. Fiaz H. Shah, Advocate. Date of hearing: 30-08-2024 Date of order: 30-08-2024 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – 1] Urgency granted 2] Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3] The Appeal is from an order dated 19-02-2024 passed by a learned Single Judge in Suit No. 18/2015, dismissing the Appellant’s application for rejection of the plaint under Order VII Rule 11 CPC. The Appellant had prayed for rejection of the plaint on the ground that the suit was time-barred. A perusal of the plaint reflects that the suit is essentially for cancellation of a registered instrument dated 26-11-2014. Limitation for such a suit prescribed in Article 91 of the Limitation Act, 1908 is three years. The suit was filed on 01-01-2015 i.e. within a few months of the impugned instrument, and therefore well within limitation. Therefore, there is no error in the impugned order. The appeal is therefore dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
